articles.title: Once a piped dream, now a necessity
articles.description: Disruptions triggered by the West Asia war have upended LPG supply chains, pushing households, hotels and industries alike to turn to piped natural gas (PNG) across Telangana. Gas distribution companies are speeding up network expansion, though adoption remains largely urban and cluster-driven. While PNG offers uninterrupted supply and more convenience, challenges such as infrastructure costs and last-mile connectivity persist, even as the State positions it as a more reliable, cleaner alternative to conventional cooking fuel, writes N. Ravi Kumar

articles.title: Annatto seed growers pitch for government support
articles.description: Cultivated on nearly 10,000 acres, these seeds are the world’s second most important natural colourant after caramel. Thanks to impressive laboratory tests confirming seed quality and organic farming practices, they are in high demand across the European Union and the Middle East. However, the absence of government-backed organic certification, a proper procurement mechanism, and adequate storage facilities is forcing farmers to sell their produce at throwaway prices to middlemen, writes T. Appalanaidu.

articles.title: US Iran War LIVE: Trump calls Iran war 'perfect', claims Tehran agreed to return ‘nuclear dust’
articles.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran has repeatedly insisted that it doesn’t seek a nuclear weapon and that its program is for peaceful proposes. Neither Iran nor countries acting as intermediaries in the conflict have talked about what would be a major breakthrough.

articles.title: Trump claims Iran ‘agreed’ to abandon nuclear weapons, return enriched uranium
articles.description: Trump struck an optimistic tone on negotiations, saying prospects for a deal were “looking very good” and progress was moving quickly.

articles.title: HDFC Life Q4 Review: Brokerages See Upto 50% Upside Despite Soft Growth
articles.description: Brokerage data suggests a broader bullish stance on the stock, with most analysts maintaining buy ratings and an average targets implying upto 50% upside from current levels.

articles.title: Once a piped dream, now a necessity
articles.description: Disruptions triggered by the West Asia war have upended LPG supply chains, pushing households, hotels and industries alike to turn to piped natural gas (PNG) across Telangana. Gas distribution companies are speeding up network expansion, though adoption remains largely urban and cluster-driven. While PNG offers uninterrupted supply and more convenience, challenges such as infrastructure costs and last-mile connectivity persist, even as the State positions it as a more reliable, cleaner alternative to conventional cooking fuel, writes N. Ravi Kumar

articles.title: "A Convenient Punching Bag": Sanjiv Goenka To NDTV On Social Media Narratives
articles.description: Lucknow Super Giants owner Sanjiv Goenka spoke to NDTV about social media controversies over his animated interactions with players, clarifying they are not scoldings but misinterpreted gestures.

articles.title: Mohith Reddy denies Lokesh’s charge against Chevireddy family
articles.description: Mohith Reddy said the allegations that the Chevireddy family was involved in the liquor scam and laddu scam were baseless

articles.title: Parliament special sitting LIVE: Lok Sabha to vote today on three bills to amend the women’s quota law
articles.description: PM Narendra Modi and Amit Shah on Thursday, April 16, told the Lok Sabha that the Bills to amend the women’s reservation law and a fresh delimitation exercise will keep current proportional representation of southern States intact.

articles.title: Delimitation Bill could undermine Odisha’s representation, says Naveen, urging MPs from State to raise their voices against it
articles.description: Former Odisha Chief Minister Naveen Patnaik says States such as Odisha, which have made significant strides in population control and human development, are being penalised

articles.title: Women's Reservation Act comes into force even as House debates its implementation

topStories.title: US To Delay Weapons Supply To Some European Allies Due To Iran War: Report
topStories.description: The delays underline the degree to which the war against Iran, which began with US-Israeli air strikes on February 28, has begun to stretch US supplies of some critical weaponry and ammunition.

topStories.title: 'They Want Me': Trump Floats Pakistan Visit If US-Iran Deal Nears Finale
topStories.description: Trump said Iran had accepted "almost everything" being proposed in talks aimed at ending the conflict that erupted earlier this year.

topStories.title: Donald Trump alleges ‘Mamdani is DESTROYING New York’: ‘Tax policies so wrong’ | Watch
topStories.description: Governor Hochul plans a new tax on multimillion-dollar second homes in NYC, aiming for $500 million in revenue to support the city’s budget.

topStories.title: Oil Price Today (April 17): Crude oil prices fall on Israel-Lebanon ceasefire, Iran war peace talks. Is the worst over?
topStories.description: Oil prices dipped as Middle East tensions eased with a Lebanon-Israel ceasefire and potential US-Iran talks. President Trump indicated a deal with Iran was close, following a 10-day truce that removes a key obstacle to negotiations. Experts anticipate continued volatility but expect prices to remain supported.

topStories.title: Donald Trump picks Erica Schwartz as CDC director — All you need to know about former deputy surgeon general
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump nominated former deputy surgeon general Erica Schwartz to serve as CDC director after Susan Monarez's ouster. Trump described Schwartz as ‘incredibly talented’ and a ‘star.’

topStories.description: The petition filed by advocate Ashwini Kumar Upadhyay contended that deceitful religious conversion is not only a serious threat to sovereignty, secularism, democracy and liberty but also a menace to fraternity, dignity, unity and national integration

dailyNews.title: Gloabl Markets: Asian stocks dip as traders await ceasefire news
dailyNews.description: Asian stocks declined as investors reduced holdings ahead of the weekend, awaiting progress on extending the US-Iran ceasefire. This follows a global equity rally driven by expectations of prolonged peace, which pushed markets to record highs. Crude oil prices slipped as President Trump expressed optimism about a permanent truce, while gold edged higher.

dailyNews.title: Cong faces backlash from section of Muslim leaders over Davanagere south bypoll
dailyNews.description: Muslim leaders in Karnataka accuse Congress of alienating minorities after expulsions and removals, warning of potential electoral consequences.

dailyNews.title: ‘Would go to Islamabad if…’: Donald Trump says war with Iran should be ending ‘pretty soon’
dailyNews.description: President Trump indicated he might visit Pakistan if a US-Iran peace deal is finalized, praising Pakistan's role in negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Lebanon ceasefire: Who said what? Bibi vows troops will stay; Trump hails talks ‘very exciting’ - How Iran reacts?
dailyNews.description: Iranian Parliament speaker Ghalibaf asserts that Lebanon must be included in any peace agreement between Iran and the U.S., emphasizing its importance for regional stability.

dailyNews.title: Iran war live: Ceasefire starts in Lebanon as Trump says Tehran deal close
dailyNews.description: Death toll from Israeli attacks on Lebanon reached 2,196 on Thursday as 10-day ceasefire announced.

dailyNews.title: Trump cheers ‘seasoned diplomat’ Taranjit Sandhu on appointment as Delhi Lt Governor, ‘Wishing him success’
dailyNews.description: TS Sandhu served as India's Ambassador to the US from 2020-24.

dailyNews.title: People in Beirut wary of trusting Israel will uphold Lebanon ceasefire
dailyNews.description: Lebanon’s residents say they are wary of trusting that Israel will abide by the ceasefire agreement announced by Trump.

dailyNews.title: US panel approves Trump’s design for massive arch in Washington, DC
dailyNews.description: The proposed 76-metre arch would tower over other iconic landmarks in Washington, DC, and has attracted scrutiny.

dailyNews.title: US State Department restricts visas for those who ‘support adversaries’
dailyNews.description: Trump administration says it has taken action against 26 people 'across our hemisphere' who allegedly undermined US.

dailyNews.title: Trump congratulates Taranjit Singh Sandhu on Delhi LG appointment, praises India-US role
dailyNews.description: Taranjit Singh Sandhu took the oath of office at Lok Niwas, administered by Delhi High Court Chief Justice Devendra Kumar Upadhyaya.

dailyNews.title: US House votes to extend temporary protections for Haitians in Trump rebuke
dailyNews.description: Ten Republicans join Democrats to extend Temporary Protected Status for nearly 350,000 Haitians in the United States.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin announces expansion of visa restriction policy in Western Hemisphere
dailyNews.description: The State Department said it imposed visa restrictions on 26 individuals under the expanded policy targeting those acting for U.S. adversaries.

dailyNews.title: Miami Catholic Charities loses $11M contract providing care for migrant children under Trump administration
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration canceled an $11 million Catholic Charities contract in Miami, citing a drop in illegal immigration and fewer unaccompanied minors.

dailyNews.title: Franklin Graham defends Trump in letter shared on Truth Social after AI ‘Jesus’ image backlash
dailyNews.description: Rev. Franklin Graham defended Trump over an AI-generated image controversy, saying the president thought it depicted a doctor helping someone, not Jesus.

dailyNews.title: Trump to Nominate Dr. Erica Schwartz, a Vaccine Supporter, as CDC Director
dailyNews.description: Dr. Erica Schwartz is seen as a highly qualified traditional choice and tapping her is the strongest signal yet that the administration is veering away from vaccine skepticism this election year.

dailyNews.title: Trump to Pick Ousted FEMA Head to Lead Agency Again
dailyNews.description: Cameron Hamilton is a former Navy SEAL who ran unsuccessfully for Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is the End of a 100-Year Experiment
dailyNews.description: A conservative court watcher explains why the president has failed to bend the judicial branch to his will.
